overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a racing simulator showing a BMW driving through a rain-soaked tunnel at night before emerging onto a dark highway. The video features realistic rain effects on the windshield, active wipers, and high-speed driving with occasional traffic.

segments.scene_description: Driving through a rain-soaked highway tunnel at night, illuminated by rows of overhead lights. The driver approaches and overtakes slower traffic while rain streaks across the windshield and wipers maintain visibility.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle exits the tunnel into the open night, transitioning from the warm artificial lighting to the dark exterior. Highway guardrails appear on the sides and overhead signs become visible in the distance as the car emerges into the rainy night.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane highway at night with overhead signage

ambient light pollution from distant urban area on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Driving along the open highway at night in heavy rain, passing under overhead signage and alongside guardrails. Street lights line the road while the windshield wipers work continuously to clear the rain, with distant city lights visible on the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a vehicle transitions from the artificial glow of a rain-soaked tunnel into the expansive darkness of a stormy highway. It begins by speeding through a tunnel illuminated by rows of overhead lights, overtaking slower traffic while wipers clear streaks of rain from the windshield. As the car reaches the end of the passage, the warm interior lighting gives way to the deep shadows of the open night, with guardrails and distant overhead signs appearing as the vehicle emerges. The scene then expands into a wide highway under heavy rain, passing beneath signage and alongside street lights that punctuate the darkness. Finally, the camera maintains its high-speed trajectory along the wet road, with the faint glimmer of city lights appearing on the distant horizon.
